SELECT bitTestAny(number, 0, 2, 4) FROM test_table WHERE number IN (2, 6, 10);
SELECT bitTestAny(number, 0, 2, 4) FROM (SELECT number FROM test_table WHERE number > 10) AS subquery;
SELECT DISTINCT bitTestAny(number, index) FROM test_table ARRAY JOIN [0, 1, 2, 3, 4];
SELECT count(*) FROM test_table WHERE bitTestAny(number, 0) = 1;
CREATE TABLE bit_test_results AS SELECT bitTestAny(number, 0, 1, 2) AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT result FROM bit_test_results WHERE result = 1;
